Before long, each finds in the other a sort of soul mate, forging a deep bond that kicks the generation gap aside and redefines the meaning of friendship, love, and trust.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: A titan of industry is sent to prison after she's caught for insider trading. When she emerges ready to rebrand herself as America's latest sweetheart, not everyone she screwed over is so quick to forgive and forget.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: Brad Taggart is a kind-hearted radio executive who wants to be the best possible stepfather to his wife's two children. When her freewheeling ex-husband Dusty breezes back into town, Brad's feeling of insecurity quickly develops into an inferiority complex. As Dusty demonstrates his flair for athletics, home repair and bad-boy charisma, Taggart finds himself in a no-holds-barred battle to one-up his rival and win the approval of his family.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Male nurse Greg Focker is poised to propose to his girlfriend Pam during a weekend stay at her parents' home. But here's the catch....he needs to ask her father first. Alas, the fur flies as Jack Byrnes, Pam's cat-crazy, ex-CIA father takes an immediate dislike to her less-than-truthful beau. Greg's quest for approval gets seriously side-tracked as Murphy's Law takes over and a hilarious string of mishaps turns him into a master of disaster and total pariah in the eyes of the entire family, all except for his shell-shocked girlfriend, who can't believe she still lovers her one-man wrecking crew.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy and the Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world! After a scandal threatens to derail their last year at Barden, the three-time defending champs worry that they've lost their harmony for good. With one chance left at redeeming their legacy, they must they must face off against the toughest competition on the planet: German supergroup Das Sound Machine and fight for their right to win at the World Championships of A Cappella. It will take the power of sisterhood to find their voice and see what it takes to be the world's top pitches!

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Beck is a bounty hunter sent into the treacherous jungles of the Amazon to bring the rebellious Travis back to the States. When Beck and Travis reluctantly join forces to hunt down a priceless treasure, this unlikely team embarks on a pulse-pounding, nonstop thrill ride.

programme.title: RV
programme.desc: In Bob's togetherness road trip plan (which is a ruse to keep him from losing his job), everything that can go wrong does, and his attempts to unite his family threatens to tear them further apart.

programme.title: The Benchwarmers
programme.desc: In this outrageous slapstick comedy funny-men Rob Schneider, David Spade and Jon Heder star as three older guys with little sporting ability, who spent a lot of time on the bench when they were kids. Now they have a second chance to fulfil their childhood sporting dreams when they take on a squad of Little League baseball bullies. Striking a blow for the athletically-challenged they soon become unlikely heroes to the bullied, clumsy and awkward and an inspiration to benchwarmers everywhere.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: A pair of energy drink salesmen are forced into the role of big brothers to fulfil a community service obligation. But what at first seems like an easy way to do their time quickly becomes a pint-sized hassle when the kids they are assigned to mentor become a bigger challenge than they expected.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: Well, there goes the neighbourhood - in a pine box. When hit man Jimmy "The Tulip" Tudeski moves into a comfy suburb, everyone's suddenly in danger of pushing up daisies. And it's not all Jimmy's doing either. Jonathan Lynn directs and a talented ensemble cast packs heat in this manic comedy about life, love and plenty of ammo. Bruce Willis plays Jimmy, whose arrival sparks a chain reaction in which just about everybody wants to clip somebody else. Matthew Perry plays a hapless dentist who finds a way to get on the Tulip's good and bad sides.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: Nicholas Angel is a big-city cop who can't be stopped - but he's making everyone else on the force look bad. When he is reassigned to a small, quiet town, he struggles with this new, seemingly idyllic world and his bumbling partner. But their dull existence is interrupted by several grisly and suspicious accidents, and the crime-fighting duo turn up the heat and hand out high-octane, car-chasing, gun-fighting, big-city justice.

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: Hollywood Homicide redefines the buddy-cop genre. In Hollywood, no one is who they really want to be. Veteran police detective Joe Gavilan and his rookie partner K.C. Calden are no exception. Between Joe's struggling real estate business and K.C.'s fledgling acting career and yoga instruction, they've got a major murder case to solve. With both Internal Affairs and their main suspect on their tails, Joe and K.C. have to infiltrate the dangerous world of the hip-hop recording industry. Juggling two careers proves to be a comical adventure, with Joe and K.C. desperate to stay alive long enough to catch their big break.

programme.title: The Benchwarmers
programme.desc: In this outrageous slapstick comedy funny-men Rob Schneider, David Spade and Jon Heder star as three older guys with little sporting ability, who spent a lot of time on the bench when they were kids. Now they have a second chance to fulfil their childhood sporting dreams when they take on a squad of Little League baseball bullies. Striking a blow for the athletically-challenged they soon become unlikely heroes to the bullied, clumsy and awkward and an inspiration to benchwarmers everywhere.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: Allison Scott is an up-and-coming entertainment journalist whose 24-year-old life is on the fast track. But it gets seriously derailed when a drunken one-night stand with slacker Ben Stone results in an unexpected pregnancy. Faced with the prospect of going it alone or getting to know the baby's father, Allison decides to give the lovable layabout a chance. An overgrown kid with no desire to settle down, Ben learns he has a big decision to make with his kid's mother-to-be: will he run or stay?

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Stifler takes centre stage in the funniest and grossest sequel to the American Pie series. Jim and Michelle's wedding plans are rushed through and nothing goes smoothly in this instalment that will have you rolling in the aisles This farcical conclusion to the breakthrough series has enough poo jokes, pre-wedding crimes against nature and goofiness to keep die-hard Pie-eaters coming back for more.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: A pair of energy drink salesmen are forced into the role of big brothers to fulfil a community service obligation. But what at first seems like an easy way to do their time quickly becomes a pint-sized hassle when the kids they are assigned to mentor become a bigger challenge than they expected.

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: Well, there goes the neighbourhood - in a pine box. When hit man Jimmy "The Tulip" Tudeski moves into a comfy suburb, everyone's suddenly in danger of pushing up daisies. And it's not all Jimmy's doing either. Jonathan Lynn directs and a talented ensemble cast packs heat in this manic comedy about life, love and plenty of ammo. Bruce Willis plays Jimmy, whose arrival sparks a chain reaction in which just about everybody wants to clip somebody else. Matthew Perry plays a hapless dentist who finds a way to get on the Tulip's good and bad sides.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: Nicholas Angel is a big-city cop who can't be stopped - but he's making everyone else on the force look bad. When he is reassigned to a small, quiet town, he struggles with this new, seemingly idyllic world and his bumbling partner. But their dull existence is interrupted by several grisly and suspicious accidents, and the crime-fighting duo turn up the heat and hand out high-octane, car-chasing, gun-fighting, big-city justice.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: Johnny Blaze was only a teenage stunt biker when he sold his soul to the devil. Years later, Johnny is a world renowned daredevil by day, but at night, he becomes the Ghost Rider of Marvel Comics legend. The devil's bounty hunter, he is charged with finding evil souls on earth and bringing them to hell. But when a twist of fate brings Johnny's long-lost love back into his life, Johnny realises he just might have a second chance at happiness - if he can beat the devil and win back his soul. To do so he'll have to defeat Blackheart, the devil's nemesis and wayward son, whose plot to take over his father's realm will bring hell on earth - unless Ghost Rider can stop him.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Wesley's life is over, his pathetic old one, anyway. Fortunately, it is all because of a girl. Enter sizzling-hot Fox, who crashes into his life and introduces him to the Fraternity, a secret society of assassins, led by the enigmatic Sloan. Seems Wes's long-lost father was killed while working for the Fraternity and Wes has been selected to target the rogue member who murdered him. But before he can complete his assignment, Wes must first uncover the dark secrets behind the Fraternity in order to determine his own destiny.

programme.title: Great White
programme.desc: A flight to a remote atoll turns into a nightmare for five passengers when their seaplane is destroyed and they're trapped on a raft, 160km from shore, with sharks lurking beneath them.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Discovering covert and faulty intelligence causes a US Army officer to go rogue as he hunts for weapons of mass destruction in an unstable region.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime. The one thing that, he didn't plan on was being double-crossed. Now he wants more than the job's payoff...he wants payback.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
programme.desc: From the Central Asian mountains to the deserts of Egypt, through the crowded streets of Paris, to beneath the ice cap of the North Pole, the elite team of operatives known as GI Joe journey on a nonstop adventure, as they use the latest in next-generation spy technology and military equipment to fight the duplicitous arms dealer Destro, and the growing threat of the mysterious Cobra organisation from plunging the world into chaos.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: In this sequel, the GI Joes are not only fighting their mortal enemy Cobra, they are forced to contend with threats from within the government that jeopardise their very existence.

programme.title: R.I.P.D.
programme.desc: Two cops are dispatched by the otherworldly Rest In Peace Department to protect and serve the living from an increasingly destructive array of souls who refuse to move peacefully to the other side. Veteran sheriff Roy Pulsifer has spent his career with the legendary police force known as RIPD, tracking monstrous spirits who are cleverly disguised as ordinary people.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: The year is 1462 and Transylvania has enjoyed a prolonged period of peace under the just and fair rule of the battle-weary Vlad III, the prince of Wallachia. But when Sultan Mehmed II demands 1000 of Wallachia's boys including Vlad's own son to become child soldiers in his army, Vlad must enter into a Faustian bargain to save his family and his people. He gains the strength of 100 men, the speed of a falling star and the power to crush his enemies. In exchange, he's inflicted with an insatiable thirst for human blood that could force him into a life of darkness and destroy all that he holds dear.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: Set in ancient China, a mercenary travels east in search of gunpowder and discovers the mighty Great Wall and the terrible secret behind why it was built.

programme.title: Hummingbird
programme.desc: After returning from Afghanistan disillusioned and homeless, an ex-Special Forces soldier returns home a damaged man, struggling to find justice in a world saturated with violence in this gritty, explosive story about London's criminal underworld.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Discovering covert and faulty intelligence causes a US Army officer to go rogue as he hunts for weapons of mass destruction in an unstable region.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: The world's hunger for extreme sports and reality competitions has grown into reality TV bloodlust. Now, the most extreme racing competition has emerged and its contestants are murderous prisoners. The rules of the Death Race are simple: win five events and you're set free. Lose and you're road kill splashed across the Internet.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Former FBI Hostage Rescue Team leader and U.S. war veteran Will Sawyer now assesses security for skyscrapers. On assignment in Hong Kong he finds the tallest, safest building in the world, The Pearl, suddenly ablaze, and he's been framed for it. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who is trapped inside the building above the fire line.

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Beck is a bounty hunter sent into the treacherous jungles of the Amazon to bring the rebellious Travis back to the States. When Beck and Travis reluctantly join forces to hunt down a priceless treasure, this unlikely team embarks on a pulse-pounding, nonstop thrill ride.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper is the lone security repairman stationed on a desolate, nearly-ruined future Earth. When he rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft, her arrival triggers a nonstop chain of events that forces him to question everything he knows, and leaves humanity's fate in his hands.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Ray Ferrier is a working class man living in New Jersey. He's estranged from his family, his life isn't in order, and he's too caught up with himself. But the unthinkable and ultimately the unexpected happens to him in an extraordinary sense. His small town life is shaken violently by the arrival of destructive intruders: Aliens which have come in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, Ray must come to the defence of his children. As the world must fend for itself by a new and very advanced enemy not of this world, its inhabitants must save humanity from a far greater force than threatens to destroy it.

programme.title: The Green Hornet
programme.desc: Britt Reid is a slacker by day, party animal by night, until he finds a serious career that's seriously cool: crime-fighting action hero. As the Green Hornet, he teams up with gadget wiz and martial arts master Kato to take down LA's underworld.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: The Jurassic World theme park lets guests experience the thrill of witnessing actual dinosaurs, but something ferocious lurks behind the park's attractions - a genetically modified dinosaur with savage capabilities. When the massive creature escapes, chaos erupts across the island. Now it's up to Owen and Claire to save the park's tourists from an all-out prehistoric assault.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Robin of Loxley returns to England after years of fighting in Crusades to find his estate destroyed and his neighbours impoverished, all by the command of the ruthless Sheriff of Nottingham. Learning that his death has been falsely reported and his love, Marian, is involved with a local politician, Robin and co-conspirator Little John launch a covert crusade against the corruption. Robin uses his lethal archery skills to intercept tax collections destined for the Sheriff's coffers, which he turns over anonymously to Marian, now a leader of the clandestine grassroots rebellion. Discovering a larger conspiracy that threatens the stability of Europe, Robin and his men launch an attack that solidifies his status as a legendary and unstoppable rebel leader.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: The city needs heroes. Darkness has settled over New York City as Shredder and his evil Foot Clan have an iron grip on everything from the police to the politicians. The future is grim until four unlikely outcast brothers rise from the sewers and discover their destiny as Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. The Turtles must work with fearless reporter April O'Neil and her wise-cracking cameraman Vern Fenwick to save the city and unravel Shredder's diabolical plan.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty McFly, a typical American teenager of the 1980s, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered DeLorean time machine, invented by a slightly mad scientist. During his often hysterical but amazing trip back in time, Marty must make certain his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so that he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Two country handymen who lead a cast of zany characters to safety in this exciting sci-fi creature adventure. Just as Val McKee and Earl Basset decide to leave Perfection, Nevada, strange rumblings prevent their departure. With the help of a shapely seismology student, they discover their desolate town is infested with gigantic man-eating creatures that live below the ground. The race is on to overcome these slimy subterraneans and find a way to higher ground.

programme.title: Pain & Gain
programme.desc: Based on the unbelievable true story. A group of personal trainers in 1990s Miami, who in pursuit of the American dream get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment to recover stolen plutonium, Ethan Hunt chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the hands of a deadly network of highly-skilled operatives intent on destroying civilization. Now, with the world at risk, Ethan and his IMF team are forced to become reluctant partners with a hard-hitting CIA agent as they race against time to stop the nuclear fallout. There's never been a threat more destructive, stunts so jaw-dropping in the film critics are calling the best "Mission" yet!

programme.title: Jurassic World: Dominion
programme.desc: With Earth once again dominated by prehistoric predators, two generations of heroes must unite for a globe-spanning adventure to shape the destiny of humans and dinosaurs.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: Targeted by a cold-blooded black ops assassin with a score to settle, their only hope is to get behind the wheel again and secure an ingenious prototype tracking device. Facing their greatest threat yet in places as far away as Abu Dhabi and as familiar as the Los Angeles streets they call home, the crew must come together once again as a team, and as a family, to protect their own.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: Now that Dom and Letty are married, Brian and Mia have retired from the game, and the rest of the crew have been exonerated, the globetrotting team has found a semblance of a normal life. But when a mysterious woman seduces Dom into the world of crime he can't seem to escape, they will face trials that will test them as never before. From the shores of Cuba and the streets of New York City to the icy plains off the arctic Barents Sea, our elite force will criss-cross the globe to stop an anarchist from unleashing chaos on the world's stage, and bring home the man who made them a family.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: After the death of her mother, Evie is approached by an unknown cousin who invites her to a lavish wedding in the English countryside. Soon, she realises a gothic conspiracy is afoot and must fight for survival as she uncovers twisted secrets in her family's history.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the Universe needs. Crash landing, with no memory of his past, Bumblebee takes refuge in a junkyard disguised as a VW Beetle. Charlie (Hailee Steinfeld), a teenager trying to find her place in the world, discovers and repairs the battle-scarred robot. When the Decepticons forge an alliance with a secret agency led by Agent Burns (John Cena) to hunt down the remaining Autobots, Bumblebee and Charlie team up to protect the world in an action-packed adventure filled with humour and heart that's fun for the whole family.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Over one day across the streets of LA, three lives will change forever. Desperate brothers hijack an ambulance after their heist goes awry, spiralling into the most insane escape.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Dominion
programme.desc: With Earth once again dominated by prehistoric predators, two generations of heroes must unite for a globe-spanning adventure to shape the destiny of humans and dinosaurs.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: The thrill of the hunt. It's the ultimate drug, and the more intense the rush, the higher the price. Chance, is the target of an evil mercenary who recruits homeless combat veterans for the 'amusement' of his clients, bored tycoons who will pay a half a million dollars to stalk and kill the most challenging prey of them all: Man.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, is an unlucky fixer determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When detectives Ricardo Tubbs and Sonny Crockett are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Legendary monster hunter Van Helsing must rely on the help of the beautiful and mysterious Anna Valeris as he engages in an epic battle with the ultimate forces of darkness, Dracula, the Wolf Man and Frankenstein's monster.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In this prequel to the blockbuster Mummy films, a mercenary is hired by a dissident alliance to kill the beautiful sorceress Cassandra, from whom the brutal tyrant Memnon draws his strength. Once Cassandra is removed the alliance plans to face Memnon's armies on their own terms, but the sorceress is not all she seems in this swirling, CGI-laden romp.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper is the lone security repairman stationed on a desolate, nearly-ruined future Earth. When he rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft, her arrival triggers a nonstop chain of events that forces him to question everything he knows, and leaves humanity's fate in his hands.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The greatest adventure of all time begins with a young crew's maiden voyage on board the most advanced starship ever created: the USS Enterprise. In the midst of an incredible journey full of optimism, intrigue, comedy and cosmic peril, the new recruits must find a way to stop an evil being whose mission of vengeance threatens all of mankind. The fate of the galaxy rests in the hands of bitter rivals born worlds apart.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Blamed for the terrorist bombing of the Kremlin, IMF operative Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) is disavowed along with the rest of the agency when the President initiates 'Ghost Protocol'. Left without any resources or backup, Ethan must find a way to clear his agency's name and prevent another attack. To complicate matters further, Ethan is forced to embark on this mission with a team of fellow IMF fugitives whose personal motives he does not fully know.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: With the IMF disbanded, and Ethan out in the cold, the team now faces off against a network of highly skilled special agents, the Syndicate. These highly-trained operatives are hell-bent on creating a new world order through an escalating series of terrorist attacks. Ethan gathers his team and joins forces with disavowed British agent Ilsa Faust, who may or may not be a member of this rogue nation, as the group faces their most impossible mission yet.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Discovering covert and faulty intelligence causes a US Army officer to go rogue as he hunts for weapons of mass destruction in an unstable region.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: John Dillinger, a charismatic and elusive bank robber, is marked by the FBI as America's first 'Public Enemy No.1' and Billie Frechette is the only woman capable of capturing his heart. Hunted relentlessly by top FBI agent Melvin Purvis, Dillinger engages in an escalating game of outrunning and outgunning the FBI, culminating in an explosive, legendary showdown.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: A harrowing war drama where two Black Hawk helicopters are shot down over Mogadishu, trapping an elite team of American soldiers in a 15-hour firefight as they try to recover their fallen comrades.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: When a small town police chief arrests a vagrant hitchhiker, little does he know that he has set in motion a catastrophic series of events. The vagrant in question is in fact John Rambo. Rambo makes a daring escape from the small town jail to the shelter of the mountains and prepares himself for a one man war.

programme.title: Great White
programme.desc: A flight to a remote atoll turns into a nightmare for five passengers when their seaplane is destroyed and they're trapped on a raft, 160km from shore, with sharks lurking beneath them.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: Phillip Noyce directs Angelina Jolie as Evelyn Salt, a CIA officer who swore an oath to duty, honour and country. When she is accused by a defector of being a Russian sleeper spy, Salt goes on the run to clear her name and ultimately prove her loyalty. Using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative, she must elude capture and protect her family or the world's most powerful forces will erase any trace of her existence. With her superiors convinced she's out to assassinate the president, she also must race the clock to learn the identity of the real traitor.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is a broken man after he loses everything including his job and fiancee. Just when his life is at its lowest, he becomes host to an alien symbiote which results in extraordinary superpowers - transforming him into Venom. Will these powers be enough for this new lethal protector to defeat great evil forces, especially against the far stronger and more weaponized symbiote rival, Riot?

programme.title: Dead Again in Tombstone
programme.desc: After saving himself from an eternity in Hell, Guerrero continues to roam the Wild West collecting bounties on behalf of Lucifer.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: Johnny Blaze was only a teenage stunt biker when he sold his soul to the devil. Years later, Johnny is a world renowned daredevil by day, but at night, he becomes the Ghost Rider of Marvel Comics legend. The devil's bounty hunter, he is charged with finding evil souls on earth and bringing them to hell. But when a twist of fate brings Johnny's long-lost love back into his life, Johnny realises he just might have a second chance at happiness - if he can beat the devil and win back his soul. To do so he'll have to defeat Blackheart, the devil's nemesis and wayward son, whose plot to take over his father's realm will bring hell on earth - unless Ghost Rider can stop him.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Two seemingly unrelated crimes are discovered to be connected to a bizarre revenge plot.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Ray searches for a missing girl being held hostage by human traffickers. He believes the victim may now be part of a Las Vegas prostitution ring.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A murder at a bowling alley is investigated after an unusual piece of evidence is discovered during a bowling tournament.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick, Greg and Hodges take Henry, the lab's toxicologist, to celebrate his birthday at a biker bar, where they uncover a double homicide and realise the murderer may still be at the bar.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A shootout at a gun store may be linked to the death of a young woman who was involved in a suicide pact.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Two beautiful women are murdered in a Las Vegas hotel and the CSIs uncover an unusual killer during their investigation. Meanwhile, Langston continues to hunt Dr Jekyll.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A legendary golf pro is murdered during a high-profile tournament.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Riley Adams has left, and the team investigate the suspicious death of a young actress, who was killed in a questionable traffic accident.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A porn producer and a drug dealer are murdered in an upscale Las Vegas area, and the investigation centres on the members of the affluent neighbourhood.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Two office colleagues plan to rob a casino, but their misguided plot ends in murder.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A police officer kills another police officer, and the CSIs must determine if the shooting was accidental or premeditated. The evidence also suggests the death may have been racially motivated.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A beloved college football coach is murdered in his home, and his entire team comes under suspicion in the case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Two seemingly unrelated crimes are discovered to be connected to a bizarre revenge plot.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Ray searches for a missing girl being held hostage by human traffickers. He believes the victim may now be part of a Las Vegas prostitution ring.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A legendary golf pro is murdered during a high-profile tournament.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the deaths of two high-school students involved in illegal street racing.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The bass guitarist of a country music band is electrocuted during a concert. He recovers with partial memory loss, which helps begin the CSIs investigation into possible sabotage.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The body of a 14-year-old boy is discovered in a field and the investigation reveals the victim has blood under his fingernails that matches a convicted killer who is in prison for murdering his wife.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Detective Vartann and Catherine pose as a couple during a 24-hour stakeout on a drug operation in an upscale hotel; Langston and Nick work on a case involving a woman's death linked to a fetish club.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston investigates the murder of a family and thinks he's finally found a suspect for Dr Jekyll. But all is not what it seems.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Hodges and Wendy take a group of students on a field trip through the crime lab.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine investigates the case of a student found dead near her daughter's school, leading to a world of racism and a dark secret from one of the school crew uncovered.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of a legendary comedian who appears to have died under mysterious circumstances. Langston and Sara try to solve the case of a bullet-ridden corpse.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs assist Brass in helping a family friend to solve the disappearance of her family during a car accident.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A reporter covering the Dr Jekyll serial murders is strangled to death and the victim's husband accuses Ray of the crime and of other deaths in the past that his wife investigated.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs attempt to capture the elusive Dr Jekyll with the help of another serial murderer, Nate Haskell, who claims to know who he is.

programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the deaths of two high-school students involved in illegal street racing.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The eleventh season of CSI begins where the team is concerned for Langston after he is stabbed by serial killer Nate Haskell. Meanwhile, a bombing occurs at a police funeral.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A woman is attacked by a shark at the Golden Nugget Casino pool. The main suspect is the owner of the rival casino. Also, a scuba diver is found dead in a shark aquarium.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A convention of vampires and werewolves is featured. A member of the Vampire Cult is decapitated and the CSIs plunge into a world of creeds and a legendary rivalry between these mythological creatures.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Sqweegel is the forensic-proof serial killer from the first Level 26 novel, Dark Origins, who kills people who have secrets and tries to get them to confess to something they have done in order to stay alive.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: In this episode, the CSIs visit a hoarder's house, where they find more than one body.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A body of a college student is found in the desert and appears to have been punctured by dinosaur teeth. Meanwhile, the shooting of a business man leads the CSIs to two teen murders that happened five years ago.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs try put a body back together, after it is literally shredded.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate after several sources for a newspaper article of illegal natural gas dumping are found dead.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The sky is falling, or at least people are. Ray, Catherine, and Nick try to figure out if it was murder or suicide when a man is found dead after falling from a hotel.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The wife of an FBI agent is murdered. The FBI agent had been chasing a serial paedophile, who is suspected of kidnapping the agent's children.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A woman is strangled and found in a garbage bin.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The eleventh season of CSI begins where the team is concerned for Langston after he is stabbed by serial killer Nate Haskell. Meanwhile, a bombing occurs at a police funeral.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The sky is falling, or at least people are. Ray, Catherine, and Nick try to figure out if it was murder or suicide when a man is found dead after falling from a hotel.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The wife of an FBI agent is murdered. The FBI agent had been chasing a serial paedophile, who is suspected of kidnapping the agent's children.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A woman is strangled and found in a garbage bin.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs find a body with burn marks.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A night full of celebration ends with a bang when the director of a scholarship foundation for the deaf is killed by a deadly car bomb.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The crew investigates the gruesome murder of a high-powered, widowed lawyer, while Ray faces that it is time to move on from his old life when his wife comes to Vegas.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While Langston testifies against Nate Haskell, Nick is warned that he is in danger, but cannot tell him who or why without putting him self in even more danger.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.sub-title: Turn On, Tune In, Drop Dead
programme.desc: The CSIs must deal with two bodies which are not dead after all.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team investigates the prison murder of a cop, Vance, who was incarcerated for murdering his wife, but believed he was framed.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs try to solve a connection, involving a homicide, suicide, accidental, and natural deaths, which all happen in one shift.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Ray and Sara visits Grissom's friend, 'Lady Heather', to solve a strange case involving a woman who is mauled to death by a mountain lion.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: As the notorious Nate Haskell sends a threatening video to the father of one of his brides threatening to kill her, the CSI team must catch him.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While the LV CSI continues to search for Haskell, Ray's ex-wife is kidnapped and Haskell leaves a message written in blood drawing the team to Los Angeles.

programme.desc: Ray has tracked Haskell back to his childhood house and now squares off against the notorious 'Dick and Jane' Killer.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Under the direction of new boss D.B. Russell, the team tackles cases involving a wild shootout on a Las Vegas tram car, and the death of a deer hunter.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Three suspects come forward with three different reasons why they killed an entire family and the CSI team has to determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While on a date, Nick realises a piece of art at an exhibit has decomposing body parts in it, which leads to a full-blown investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The former mayor of Las Vegas is shot at the Mob Museum and the CSIs embark on a history lesson in search of clues.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a hijacked medevac helicopter goes missing along with CSI Brody on board, the hunt is on.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The murder of a popular sideshow performer sends the team behind the scenes at a carnival freak show.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team is called to investigate a car crash where they will find three casualties and a human brain that doesn't belong to any of the victims.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates three seemingly unrelated murders, they discover someone is getting revenge for cold case murders that were never solved.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The murder of a retired army ranger brings the FBI in on the case, to Russell and Catherine's initial chagrin.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a man's dead body turns up naked in the bed of Doc Robbins' wife, the detectives try to "just work the scene" without bringing their pre-judgements to the table.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine's friend Laura's mogul husband Mark has a lot to hide behind his successful international corporation, and he's hired a crack team of assassins to carry out the murders of anyone who might be aware of what he's doing.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team says goodbye to Catherine Willows as she makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a series of murders by a serial killer who seems to be recreating a particular woman with the corpses of the women he kills.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Russell asks for advice from a former colleague on a case involving the death of a man's ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a house is stolen completely off its foundation, the CSIs are on the case in search of answers. Meanwhile, new CSI Julie Finlay showcases her skill in blood analysis.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a blackout cripples the city, the CSIs must revert to old-school methods to solve the case of a missing child.

programme.title: 44 Inch Chest
programme.desc: Colin (Ray Winstone) is in agony, shattered by his wife's (Joanne Whalley) infidelity. However, he has friends who do more than stand by - they kidnap the wife's French lover and hold him prisoner so that Colin can restore his manhood with revenge. A kangaroo court takes place and as the situation Colin wrestles with remorse, grief and self pity, all the while egged on by his motley crew of friends who just want him to get on with it.

programme.title: Macbeth
programme.desc: The story of a fearless warrior and inspiring leader brought low by ambition and desire. A thrilling interpretation of the dramatic realities of the times and a truthful re-imagining of what wartime must have really been like for one of Shakespeare's most famous and compelling characters, a story of all-consuming passion and ambition set in war-torn 11th century Scotland.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The extraordinary and epic true story of Eric Lomax, a British Army officer who is tormented as a prisoner of war at a Japanese labour camp during World War II. Decades later, Lomax and his beautiful love interest, Patti, discover that the Japanese interpreter responsible for much of his treatment is still alive. They set out to confront him, and Eric's haunting past, in this powerful and inspiring tale of heroism, humanity and the redeeming power of love.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: Virgil Oldman is a solitary, cultured man whose reluctance to engage with others, especially women, is matched only by the dogged obsessiveness with which he practices his profession of antiques dealer. He's never been close to another human being, not even Robert, his only friend - a young, skilful restorer of mechanical devices from every era. The day he turns 63, Virgil receives a phone call from a young woman who asks him to handle the disposal of some family works of art. But when the time comes for his first site visit, the girl fails to appear, nor, for various reasons, is she present for the taking of the inventory or for the transportation and restoration of the pieces. More than once Virgil is tempted to bow out of what appears to be nothing but a bothersome mess, but on each occasion, the mysterious young woman, locked in her own obsessive world, convinces him to continue. And with this, the old antique dealer's life begins to take an unexpected turn. It is Robert who shows him, step-by-step, how to win the heart of a young woman who is afraid of the world and, caught in the middle of this puzzling game of chess, Virgil soon finds himself enveloped by a passion that will transform his grey existence forever.

programme.title: Tell it to the Bees
programme.desc: A shunned small-town doctor and beekeeper in post-war Britain befriends a struggling mother and son, helping them discover that love can be found in many forms.

programme.title: Set Fire To The Stars
programme.desc: An aspiring poet in 1950s New York has his ordered world shaken when he embarks on a week-long retreat to save his hell-raising hero, Dylan Thomas.

programme.title: The Descent
programme.desc: On an annual extreme outdoor adventure, six women meet in a remote part of the Appalachians to explore a cave hidden deep in the woods. Far below the surface of the earth, disaster strikes when a rock fall blocks their exit and there's no way out. The women push on, praying for another exit, but there is something else lurking under the earth. The friends are now prey, forced to unleash their most primal instincts in an all-out war against an unspeakable horror - one that attacks without warning, again and again and again.

programme.title: Macbeth
programme.desc: The story of a fearless warrior and inspiring leader brought low by ambition and desire. A thrilling interpretation of the dramatic realities of the times and a truthful re-imagining of what wartime must have really been like for one of Shakespeare's most famous and compelling characters, a story of all-consuming passion and ambition set in war-torn 11th century Scotland.

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A lovesick young woman searches for the father of her unborn child in seedy Birmingham and becomes involved with a mysterious catering manager.

programme.title: On Chesil Beach
programme.desc: Based on Ian McEwan's novel. In 1962 England, a young couple find their idyllic romance colliding with issues of sexual freedom and societal pressure, leading to an awkward and fateful wedding night.

programme.title: The Bookshop
programme.desc: Set in a small town in 1959 England, a woman decides, against polite but ruthless local opposition, to open a bookshop, a decision which becomes a political minefield.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: The incredible true story of six days of terror, after six heavily-armed gunmen invade the Iranian Embassy in London in 1980 and take 26 people hostage.

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: A weary assassin hires a gangster's cocky stepson as his driver. A stunning woman upsets their plans in this witty caper starring Tim Roth and Talulah Riley.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang in the UK traffic eastern European people and then enslave them, the women to sex, the men to illegal fights. They cross a local businessman, and a war escalates.

programme.title: The Descent: Part 2
programme.desc: In this sequel to the critically acclaimed horror hit a dazed, bloodied and speechless Sarah emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system, before being forced back underground to help the rescue team find her missing friends. As the team move deeper into the caves, Sarah's flashes of fractured memory intensify and she begins to realise the full horror of the would-be rescue mission. Only Sarah knows the terror which lurks in the shadows of the caves. They are about to encounter a new tribe of Crawlers, inbred, deformed and even more viciously feral than those Sarah faced before.

programme.title: A Guide To Second Date Sex
programme.desc: Laura and Ryan have been totally destroyed by previous relationships. In the hope of getting it right, they go on a second date having no idea what they're supposed to do.

programme.title: On Chesil Beach
programme.desc: Based on Ian McEwan's novel. In 1962 England, a young couple find their idyllic romance colliding with issues of sexual freedom and societal pressure, leading to an awkward and fateful wedding night.

programme.title: The Bookshop

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang in the UK traffic eastern European people and then enslave them, the women to sex, the men to illegal fights. They cross a local businessman, and a war escalates.

programme.title: Quant
programme.desc: The life of Mary Quant, the designer often credited with the invention of the mini skirt, chronicling her rise from a fashion-conscious tomboy to a daring avant-garde designer.

programme.title: The Descent: Part 2
programme.desc: In this sequel to the critically acclaimed horror hit a dazed, bloodied and speechless Sarah emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system, before being forced back underground to help the rescue team find her missing friends. As the team move deeper into the caves, Sarah's flashes of fractured memory intensify and she begins to realise the full horror of the would-be rescue mission. Only Sarah knows the terror which lurks in the shadows of the caves. They are about to encounter a new tribe of Crawlers, inbred, deformed and even more viciously feral than those Sarah faced before.

programme.title: Testament of Youth
programme.desc: A powerful story of love, war and remembrance, based on the First World War memoir by Vera Brittain, which has become the classic testimony of that war from a woman's point of view. A searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again, it's a film about young love, the futility of war and how to make sense of the darkest times.

programme.title: Stardust (2020)
programme.desc: Meet David before Bowie, one of the greatest icons in music history. But who was the young man behind the many faces?

programme.title: Another Year
programme.desc: A moving reflection on life's joys and sorrows. Tom and Gerri are a married couple who have managed to remain blissfully happy into their autumn years. Over the course of four seasons in one year, they are surrounded by friends, colleagues and family as they negotiate life with kindness, love and good cheer.

programme.title: McClaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: Victor Maynard is a middle-aged solitary assassin with a peerless reputation for lethal efficiency. His professional routine is interrupted when he finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims Rose. Going against his contract he spares her life and unexpectedly acquires a young apprentice in the process but now he must thwart the murderous attentions of his unhappy client.

programme.title: Toast
programme.desc: Bittersweet story of a food writer's road to adulthood via his association with culinary tastes and smells. A delicious love letter to set to the songs of Dusty Springfield.

programme.title: Testament of Youth
programme.desc: A powerful story of love, war and remembrance, based on the First World War memoir by Vera Brittain, which has become the classic testimony of that war from a woman's point of view. A searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again, it's a film about young love, the futility of war and how to make sense of the darkest times.

programme.title: Route Irish
programme.desc: A security contractor in Iraq rejects the official explanation of his friend's death and decides to investigate.

programme.title: Stardust (2020)

programme.title: Bright Young Things
programme.desc: Directed and written by Stephen Fry and based on the novel, Vile Bodies by Evelyn Waugh, BRIGHT YOUNG THINGS is a look at the upper crust British society during the frenzied 1930s. The story follows the lives of a group of young socialites also known as the "Bright Young Things."

programme.title: Oranges and Sunshine
programme.desc: A powerful true story about a social worker who risks all in her effort to reunite families torn apart by a heartless government policy.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: Set in the 13th century, this tale sees a rag-tag group of knights battle a devious king (Paul Giamatti). James Purefoy, Brian Cox & Kate Mara also star in this action-charged adventure.

programme.title: Gospel of Us
programme.desc: This project is the film version of the Passion play that was performed throughout Port Talbot in Easter 2011.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: Oranges and Sunshine

programme.title: Starter For 10
programme.desc: Brian Jackson is a wide-eyed working class kid whose exhaustive grasp of general knowledge leaves him wanting when it comes to women. On his way to achieving his long held ambition to appear on University Challenge, he falls in love with fellow student and team-mate Alice; has his conscience pricked by rights activist Rebecca; all while trying not to become the student keeno that his hometown mates think he'll turn into.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: Set in the 13th century, this tale sees a rag-tag group of knights battle a devious king (Paul Giamatti). James Purefoy, Brian Cox & Kate Mara also star in this action-charged adventure.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: On a Clear Day
programme.desc: A laid-off Glasgow shipbuilder strives to regain his pride after decades on the docks. Without his family's help, he attempts the ultimate test of endurance-swimming the English Channel.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady is a surprising and intimate portrait of the late Margaret Thatcher, the first and only female Prime Minister of The United Kingdom. One of the 20th century's most famous and influential women, Thatcher came from nowhere to smash through barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male dominated world.

programme.title: Coriolanus
programme.desc: Caius Martius 'Coriolanus', a revered and feared Roman General is at odds with the city of Rome and his fellow citizens. Pushed by his controlling and ambitious mother Volumnia to seek the exalted and powerful position of Consul, he is loath to ingratiate himself with the masses whose votes he needs in order to secure the office. When the public refuses to support him, Coriolanus's anger prompts a riot that culminates in his expulsion from Rome. The banished hero then allies himself with his sworn enemy Tullus Aufidius to take his revenge on the city.

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: A thriller set in London's slave trade and centred on a woman's fight for freedom.

programme.title: The Show
programme.desc: A man's search for a stolen artifact leads him to the haunted town filled with Voodoo gangsters, masked adventurers, Depression-era private eyes and violent chiaroscuro women.

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: Laing is a surgeon who moves into a tower on the outskirts of London. The brutalist brainchild of architect Royal, it offers residents everything they need, except contact with the outside world. When the concrete monolith's electrical circuits malfunction, so does the moral compass of everyone inside. Decadence and depravity become the new norm. Fighting and fornication are rampant and warfare between lower and upper floors erupts, while murder barely raises an eyebrow. Amid the chaos, the stinging sociopolitical satire about the thin line between human advancement and de-evolution of the species is unavoidable.

programme.title: On a Clear Day
programme.desc: A laid-off Glasgow shipbuilder strives to regain his pride after decades on the docks. Without his family's help, he attempts the ultimate test of endurance-swimming the English Channel.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady is a surprising and intimate portrait of the late Margaret Thatcher, the first and only female Prime Minister of The United Kingdom. One of the 20th century's most famous and influential women, Thatcher came from nowhere to smash through barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male dominated world.

programme.title: Coriolanus
programme.desc: Caius Martius 'Coriolanus', a revered and feared Roman General is at odds with the city of Rome and his fellow citizens. Pushed by his controlling and ambitious mother Volumnia to seek the exalted and powerful position of Consul, he is loath to ingratiate himself with the masses whose votes he needs in order to secure the office. When the public refuses to support him, Coriolanus's anger prompts a riot that culminates in his expulsion from Rome. The banished hero then allies himself with his sworn enemy Tullus Aufidius to take his revenge on the city.

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: Based on the best selling novel a woman committed to a mental hospital for much of her life, must rely on her diary to recount her memories to a Doctor, who is reassessing her for the move to a new facility.

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: A thriller set in London's slave trade and centred on a woman's fight for freedom.

programme.title: The Show
programme.desc: A man's search for a stolen artifact leads him to the haunted town filled with Voodoo gangsters, masked adventurers, Depression-era private eyes and violent chiaroscuro women.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Gabe Walker is a member of the mountain-climbing rescue team. While crossing a ledge 1220m above the Earth, Gabe's friend's equipment fails and she slips out of his hand, falling to her death. Almost a year after, he must return to those dreaded peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against ruthless criminals, unforgiving nature and himself.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: Dr Sherman Klump, a kind, calorically challenged genetics professor who longs to shed his 400-pound frame in order to win the heart of the beautiful Carla Purty. So, with one swig of his experimental fat-reducing serum, Sherman becomes Buddy Love, a fast-talking, pumped up, plumped-down Don Juan. Can Sherman stop his buff alter ego before it's too late, or will Buddy have the last laugh?

programme.title: Top Secret!
programme.desc: This rock 'n' roll spy spoof is about an Elvis-like pop idol who becomes embroiled in intrigue on a tour of East Germany and falls in love with a French Resistance Fighter. Non-stop pop-up cameos, pelvis-shaking parodies and dead-pan homage to WWII underground heroics make this an overlooked gem.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: An ex-fighter pilot who is afraid to fly is forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Incompetent detective Frank Drebin has to foil an attempt to assassinate the Queen as he woos Priscilla Presley.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Gabe Walker is a member of the mountain-climbing rescue team. While crossing a ledge 1220m above the Earth, Gabe's friend's equipment fails and she slips out of his hand, falling to her death. Almost a year after, he must return to those dreaded peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against ruthless criminals, unforgiving nature and himself.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: An ex-fighter pilot who is afraid to fly is forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Incompetent detective Frank Drebin has to foil an attempt to assassinate the Queen as he woos Priscilla Presley.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: After the release of Jake Blues from prison, he and brother Elwood go to visit the orphanage where they were raised by nuns. They learn that the church stopped its support and will sell the place unless the tax on the property is paid within 11 days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their blues band back together and staging a big gig. They may be on a 'mission from God' but they're making enemies everywhere they go.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Stranded 205,000 miles from Earth in a crippled spacecraft, astronauts Jim Lovell, Fred Haise and Jack Swigert fight a desperate battle to survive. Meanwhile, at Mission Control, astronaut Ken Mattingly, flight director Gene Kranz and a heroic ground crew race against time - and the odds - to bring them home.

programme.title: Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell Of Fear
programme.desc: Frank Drebin, the idiot detective, uncovers a plot by super villain Robert Goulet to sabotage the USA's energy policy. More slapstick mayhem in the first sequel to the comedy classic.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Larger than life, and blessed with a magical sense of serendipity, Ferris Bueller is a model for all those who take themselves too seriously. One spring day, toward the end of his senior year, Ferris (Matthew Broderick) gives in to an overwhelming urge to cut school and head for downtown Chicago with his girl (Mia Sara) and his best friend (Alan Ruck), to see the sights, experience a day of freedom and show that with a little ingenuity, a bit of courage and a red Ferrari, life at 17 can be a joy. Featuring Charlie Sheen and Jennifer Grey, it's of the most iconic films of the 80s, and one of writer/director John Hughes' best.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: A hugely entertaining thriller that crackles with electricity and suspense. Wealthy banker Nicholas Van Orton is given a surprise birthday present by his younger brother: a gift certificate for something called 'The Game'. Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A new, technologically superior Soviet nuclear sub, the Red October, is heading for the US coast under the command of Captain Marko Ramius. The American government thinks Ramius is planning to attack. A lone CIA analyst has a different idea: he thinks Ramius is planning to defect, but he has only a few hours to find him and prove it - because the entire Russian naval and air commands are trying to find him, too. The hunt is on.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: After the release of Jake Blues from prison, he and brother Elwood go to visit the orphanage where they were raised by nuns. They learn that the church stopped its support and will sell the place unless the tax on the property is paid within 11 days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their blues band back together and staging a big gig. They may be on a 'mission from God' but they're making enemies everywhere they go.

The hunt is on.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: The year is 1936, Indiana Jones hears from a museum curator named Marcus Brody about a biblical artefact called The Ark of the Covenant, which can hold the key to humanly existence. Joined with Marion Ravenwood and Sallah, Jones ventures to vast places such as Nepal and Egypt to find this artefact. He will have to fight his enemy Belloq and a band of Nazis for the Lost Ark.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: An undercover cop is posing as a kindergarten teacher in order to catch a dangerous criminal. Once he wrangles his young charges, as well as the affections of a beautiful teacher, he prepares for a final showdown with his intended prey in this totally enjoyable action-comedy.

programme.title: Bowfinger
programme.desc: How does Bobby Bowfinger, Hollywood's least successful director, get Kit Ramsey, Hollywood's biggest star, in his ultra low-budget film? Any way he can. With an ingenious scheme and the help of Kit's eager and nerdy brother Jiff, an ambitious and sexy wannabe and an over-the-hill diva, Bowfinger sets out to trick Kit Ramsey into the performance of a lifetime.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African Prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, it's time for him to find a princess... and the mission leads him and his most loyal friends to Queens, New York. In disguise as an impoverished immigrant, the pampered prince quickly finds himself a new job, new friends, new digs, new enemies and lots of trouble.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: The wackiest head counsellor in North Star camp history, Tripper Harrison devotes his summer activities to cracking jokes, chasing female staffers, and plotting the demise of their evil rich rivals, the snotty young brats at nearby Camp Mohawk. Jam-packed with hysterical off-the-wall hjinks, drop-dead gorgeous babes in the woods and the riotous one-liners, Meatballs is an "Animal House goes to summer camp".

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: The year is 1936, Indiana Jones hears from a museum curator named Marcus Brody about a biblical artefact called The Ark of the Covenant, which can hold the key to humanly existence. Joined with Marion Ravenwood and Sallah, Jones ventures to vast places such as Nepal and Egypt to find this artefact. He will have to fight his enemy Belloq and a band of Nazis for the Lost Ark.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: An undercover cop is posing as a kindergarten teacher in order to catch a dangerous criminal. Once he wrangles his young charges, as well as the affections of a beautiful teacher, he prepares for a final showdown with his intended prey in this totally enjoyable action-comedy.

With an ingenious scheme and the help of Kit's eager and nerdy brother Jiff, an ambitious and sexy wannabe and an over-the-hill diva, Bowfinger sets out to trick Kit Ramsey into the performance of a lifetime.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African Prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, it's time for him to find a princess... and the mission leads him and his most loyal friends to Queens, New York. In disguise as an impoverished immigrant, the pampered prince quickly finds himself a new job, new friends, new digs, new enemies and lots of trouble.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: Cole is sent back in time to save the human race from a deadly virus that has forced mankind into dank underground communities in the future. Along his travels, he encounters a psychiatrist and a mental patient who may hold the key to the mysterious rogue group, the Army of the 12 Monkeys, thought to be responsible for unleashing the killer disease. Believing he can obtain a pure virus sample in order to find a cure in the future, he is met with one riddle after another that puts him in a race with time.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: For centuries, two races of robotic aliens have waged a war with the fate of the universe at stake. When the battle comes to Earth, all that stands between the evil Decepticons and ultimate power is a clue held by a young teenager, Sam. Unaware that he alone is mankind's last chance for survival, Sam finds himself in a struggle between the Autobots and Decepticons with the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Out of Sight
programme.desc: Meet Jack Foley, the most successful bank robber in the country. On the day he busts out of jail, he finds himself stealing something far more precious than money: Karen Sisco's heart. She's smart, she's sexy, and, unfortunately for Jack, she's a federal marshal. Now, they're willing to risk it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: After a series of mysterious deaths befalls their small town, an offbeat group of friends led by Sidney Prescott become the target of a masked killer. As the body count begins to risine, Sidney her friends find themselves contemplating the "Rules" of horror films as they find themselves living in a real-life one.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: Cole is sent back in time to save the human race from a deadly virus that has forced mankind into dank underground communities in the future. Along his travels, he encounters a psychiatrist and a mental patient who may hold the key to the mysterious rogue group, the Army of the 12 Monkeys, thought to be responsible for unleashing the killer disease. Believing he can obtain a pure virus sample in order to find a cure in the future, he is met with one riddle after another that puts him in a race with time.

Now, they're willing to risk it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: After a series of mysterious deaths befalls their small town, an offbeat group of friends led by Sidney Prescott become the target of a masked killer. As the body count begins to risine, Sidney her friends find themselves contemplating the "Rules" of horror films as they find themselves living in a real-life one.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: There's a traitor in the heart of America's most secret spy network, the Impossible Mission Force. He or she is trying to steal IMF's critical agent list which would give America's enemies the names of every covert operative in the world. When a mission goes badly wrong, agent Ethan Hunt (Cruise) is suspected of being the turncoat and becomes a hunted man. With all the might of IMF now turned against him, Hunt must flush out the real traitor - even if that means stealing the secret list himself.

programme.title: Barbarella
programme.desc: In the far future, in a time of way-out, psychedelic spaceships and free love, space agent Barbarella is assigned to stop the evil Durand-Durand and save humanity.

programme.title: Barb Wire
programme.desc: Baywatch babe Pamela Anderson squeezes into a fetching black leather outfit to become the fiery Barb Wire, a sassy comic book hero who fights against injustice in the United States of 2017. Barb, a bar owner/mercenary, is persuaded to help her former lover in the fight against the fascist dictatorship now in control of the country.

programme.title: Duel
programme.desc: A travelling salesman is harassed by a menacing 40-tonne truck on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: Repo Man
programme.desc: Alex Cox directs what is now a considered a classic punk fable where Emilio Estevez stars as Otto, a newly hired repossession man who somehow becomes the partner of Bud, an old hand in the repo business, portrayed by the wonderful Harry Dean Stanton. Otto then becomes swept up in a web of intrigue concerning a huge repossession bounty on a 1964 Chevy Malibu. Bizarre events ensue leading Otto and Bud to an encounter with what seem to be beings from space. This off-beat film has a little of everything: action, comedy, urban decay, police drama, mystery, government conspiracy and even UFOs! A cult classic!

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Two country handymen who lead a cast of zany characters to safety in this exciting sci-fi creature adventure. Just as Val McKee and Earl Basset decide to leave Perfection, Nevada, strange rumblings prevent their departure. With the help of a shapely seismology student, they discover their desolate town is infested with gigantic man-eating creatures that live below the ground. The race is on to overcome these slimy subterraneans and find a way to higher ground.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.
